title: alectryon ferrugineus
intro: Alectryon ferrugineus, also known as the ironwood or iron-wood, is a plant species native to the Pacific Islands, belonging to the family Sapindaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Alectryon ferrugineus include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which help to reduce pain and inflammation, and its ability to protect against oxidative stress and cell damage. Alectryon ferrugineus is often prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture for its medicinal uses, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
